patterns.name: Chinua Achebe
patterns.story: Named for the father of African literature, this pattern speaks to the power of finding your own voice and telling your story on your own terms.

patterns.name: Haile Selassie
patterns.story: A pattern woven in honour of dignity and unshaken leadership, for the graduate who carries themselves with quiet, deliberate authority.

patterns.name: Kofi Annan
patterns.story: Inspired by diplomacy, calm strength, and global impact — for the achiever whose influence reaches far beyond where they started.

patterns.name: Kwame Nkrumah
patterns.story: A tribute to vision and independence of thought, this pattern marks the graduate ready to build something the world hasn't seen yet.

patterns.name: Malcolm X
patterns.story: Bold, direct, unapologetic — this pattern is for the graduate whose convictions were forged through struggle and sharpened by truth.

patterns.name: Nelson Mandela
patterns.story: Woven for patience, forgiveness, and the long walk to purpose, this pattern honours every graduate who stayed the course.

patterns.name: Patrice Lumumba
patterns.story: A pattern of conviction — for the graduate who stands firmly for what they believe in, whatever the cost.

patterns.name: Thabo Mbeki
patterns.story: Reflective and statesman-like, this pattern celebrates thoughtful leadership and the discipline behind lasting achievement.

patterns.name: Thomas Sankara
patterns.story: The Thomas Sankara pattern symbolizes courage, self-reliance, and African pride.

patterns.name: Yaa Asantewaa
patterns.story: Fierce and regal, this pattern is woven for the graduate who leads from the front and defends what matters most.

patterns.name: Ellen Johnson Sirleaf
patterns.story: A pattern of firsts and quiet resolve, honouring the graduate who breaks ground for everyone coming behind them.

patterns.name: Tetteh Quarshie
patterns.story: Rooted in enterprise and legacy-building, this pattern celebrates the graduate planting seeds for generations ahead.

patterns.name: Jomo Kenyatta
patterns.story: A founder's pattern — steady, deliberate, and built for the graduate laying the first stones of something lasting.

patterns.name: Julius Nyerere
patterns.story: Woven for the teacher in every achiever, this pattern honours wisdom shared freely and purpose held closely.

patterns.name: Robert Mugabe
patterns.story: A pattern of tenacity, marking the graduate whose resolve outlasted every obstacle placed in their way.

patterns.name: Strive Masiyiwa
patterns.story: Bold entrepreneurship woven into cloth — for the graduate who sees opportunity where others see risk.

patterns.name: Wole Soyinka
patterns.story: A pattern for the storytellers and truth-tellers, honouring sharp minds and the courage to speak clearly.

patterns.name: Premium Thomas Sankara
patterns.story: The premium edition of the Thomas Sankara pattern, woven with a finer hand for graduates who want every detail of courage and self-reliance rendered in full.

patterns.name: Premium Kofi Annan
patterns.story: A premium weave of the Kofi Annan pattern, refined for the graduate whose calm influence deserves the finest cloth.

patterns.name: Premium Malcolm X
patterns.story: The premium Malcolm X weave, for the graduate whose convictions call for nothing less than the finest craftsmanship.

patterns.name: Premium Yaa Asantewaa
patterns.story: A premium rendering of the Yaa Asantewaa pattern, woven with extra care for the graduate who leads boldly.

patterns.name: Premium Patrice Lumumba
patterns.story: The premium edition of the Patrice Lumumba pattern, for the graduate whose conviction deserves an equally uncompromising weave.

patterns.name: Premium Kente
patterns.story: A premium house kente colorway, densely woven for the graduate who wants a richer, more textured finish.

patterns.name: Azumah Nelson
patterns.story: Inspired by courage, resilience and victory, this pattern symbolizes the determination required to achieve greatness.

patterns.name: Queen Nzinga
patterns.story: Regal and unbending, this pattern honours the graduate who negotiates, strategizes, and refuses to be underestimated.

patterns.name: Marcus Garvey
patterns.story: A pattern of pride and pan-African vision, for the graduate who carries their heritage as a source of strength.

patterns.name: Paul Biya
patterns.story: Woven for endurance and steadiness, this pattern marks the graduate who plays the long game with quiet confidence.

patterns.name: Ephraim Amu
patterns.story: A composer's pattern — rhythmic and intentional, celebrating the graduate whose discipline turned practice into artistry.

patterns.name: Premium Kente Sene
patterns.story: A premium kente colorway carrying Senegal's palette, for the graduate celebrating cross-border African pride.

patterns.name: Premium Kente Nig
patterns.story: A premium kente colorway carrying Nigeria's palette, for the graduate celebrating cross-border African pride.

patterns.name: Premium Kente
patterns.story: A second premium house colorway, woven with its own distinct palette and finish.

patterns.name: Premium Kente Uga
patterns.story: A premium kente colorway carrying Uganda's palette, for the graduate celebrating cross-border African pride.

patterns.name: Premium Kente BAW
patterns.story: A premium kente colorway with its own distinct palette, woven for the graduate who wants something singular.

patterns.name: Philip Gbeho
patterns.story: A pattern of national pride, for the graduate whose achievement becomes part of a larger, shared story.

patterns.name: Premium Kente RWE
patterns.story: A premium kente colorway carrying Rwanda's palette, for the graduate celebrating cross-border African pride.

patterns.name: Paul Tomba
patterns.story: Woven for grounded ambition, this pattern honours steady, unglamorous work that adds up to something great.

patterns.name: Theodosia Salome Okoh
patterns.story: A pattern of quiet design and lasting symbolism, for the graduate whose contribution outlives the moment.

patterns.name: ICAG
patterns.story: A pattern of professional distinction, marking the discipline and standards behind every chartered achievement.

patterns.name: CITG
patterns.story: Precision and structure woven into cloth, for the graduate whose achievement is built on rigour and craft.

patterns.name: Unimac Kente
patterns.story: A pattern of institutional pride, celebrating the community that shaped this achievement.

patterns.name: UEW Approved
patterns.story: Crafted to institutional standard, this pattern honours the graduate who met every mark set before them.

patterns.name: Opoku Ware
patterns.story: Woven for expansion and ambition, this pattern celebrates the graduate building on strong foundations.

patterns.name: Ash and Black
patterns.story: A study in restraint — ash grey and black woven in fine lines, for the graduate whose achievement speaks quietly and clearly.

patterns.name: Premium Kente Emerald
patterns.story: A premium colorway in emerald and cream, for the graduate drawn to a cooler, more understated palette.

patterns.name: Premium Kente Sapphire
patterns.story: A premium colorway in sapphire blue, white, and black, for the graduate who wants something crisp and modern.

patterns.name: Premium Kente Ruby Gold
patterns.story: A premium colorway in deep red, gold, and navy, for the graduate who wants richness with a regal edge.
